items.title: Musk and Altman face off in court over OpenAI's for-profit pivot
items.raw_content:
The closely watched trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman kicked off in federal court in Oakland. Both sides laid out wildly different versions of the AI lab's early days.

The article
items.ai_summary: 马斯克起诉OpenAI营利转型，与奥特曼在联邦法院首次交锋。

items.title: With Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, Nvidia reveals what really goes into a modern multimodal model
items.raw_content:
Nvidia releases Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, an open multimodal model for text, image, video and audio. Not only the performance is exciting, but also a look at the training data: it comes from Qwen, GPT-OSS, Kimi and DeepSeek OCR, among others.

The article
items.ai_summary: Nvidia发布开源多模态模型Nemotron 3 Nano Omni，支持文本、图像、视频和音频，训练数据来自Qwen等。

items.title: White House moves to restore Anthropic access after Pentagon standoff
items.raw_content:
The White House is drafting guidance that would let federal agencies work with Anthropic again, including access to the company's new model Mythos.

The article
items.ai_summary: 白宫起草指导，允许联邦机构与Anthropic合作，包括使用其新模型Mythos。

items.title: OpenAI researchers explain why math is the road to AGI
items.raw_content: AI models have jumped from grade-school arithmetic to olympiad-level and research mathematics in only two years. In the OpenAI Podcast, OpenAI researchers Sebastian Bubeck and Ernest Ryu explain why math has become the key test on the road to artificial general intelli
items.ai_summary: OpenAI研究员Bubeck和Ryu解释数学能力为何是通向AGI的关键测试。

items.title: OpenAI lands on AWS one day after Microsoft deal restructuring
items.raw_content:
Microsoft and OpenAI dissolve their exclusivity deal. One day later, AWS rolls out three new OpenAI offerings on its Bedrock platform, including a jointly built agent service.

The article
items.ai_summary: 微软与OpenAI解除独家协议次日，AWS推出三个基于OpenAI的新服务。

items.title: Mistral's Le Chat spreads Iran war disinformation in 60 percent of leading prompts
items.raw_content: A NewsGuard audit found that Mistral's Le Chat repeats state-sponsored disinformation about the Iran war about half the time. The error rate ra
items.ai_summary: 审计显示Mistral的Le Chat聊天机器人有60%概率传播关于伊朗战争的虚假信息。

items.title: Google rolls out Gemini memory in Europe and wants you to bring your ChatGPT data along
items.raw_content:
Gemini can now remember your preferences and import your chat history from other AI apps.

The article Google rolls out Gemini memor
items.ai_summary: Gemini现可记忆用户偏好，并允许导入ChatGPT聊天历史。

items.title: Google Gemini now generates full documents, spreadsheets, and presentations directly inside the chat
items.raw_content:
Google Gemini now creates documents directly in the chat, from PDFs and Word files to Excel spreadsheets.

The article Googl
items.ai_summary: Google Gemini新增功能：在聊天中直接生成PDF、Word、Excel等文档。

items.title: Mistral AI takes on enterprise AI orchestration with Workflows
items.raw_content:
Mistral AI has rolled out Workflows, an orchestration layer that helps companies turn AI-powered processes into production-ready systems.

The article Mistral
items.ai_summary: Mistral AI推出Workflows编排层，帮助企业将AI流程投入生产。

items.title: Here is what an LLM that knows nothing after 1930 thinks our world looks like in 2026
items.raw_content:
"Talkie" is a 13B-parameter language model trained only on texts written before 1931. It doubts a second world war will happen and pictures 2026 as a world of steamships, railroads, and penny novels.

The article
items.ai_summary: 一个仅使用1930年前文本训练的13B参数语言模型“Talkie”对2026年的世界进行想象。
